instruction: What file formats do you support?
response: We support CSV, JSON, and Excel files up to 50MB.

instruction: Can I cancel my subscription?
response: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your account settings.

instruction: How do I upload a dataset?
response: Go to the Data tab in your project and click Upload. Drag and drop a file or click Select File to choose one.

instruction: How big can my dataset be?
response: Free accounts can upload up to 50MB per file. Paid plans support up to 5GB per file.

instruction: Does the product work offline?
response: The desktop app supports limited offline mode for viewing. Editing and syncing require an internet connection.

instruction: How do I share a project?
response: Open the project, click Share in the top right, and add collaborators by email or generate a public link.

instruction: Can I work with my team in real time?
response: Yes, all projects support real-time collaboration with presence indicators and live cursors.

instruction: How do I duplicate a project?
response: Open the project list, hover over the project, click the menu icon, and select Duplicate.

instruction: Can I download my project as a file?
response: Yes, click Export in the top right and choose your preferred format: PDF, JSON, or ZIP archive.

instruction: What integrations are available?
response: We integrate with Slack, Google Drive, Notion, Zapier, GitHub, and over 50 other tools via our integrations page.

instruction: How do I connect to Slack?
response: Go to Integrations, click Connect next to Slack, authorize the workspace, and choose which channels to use.

instruction: How do I connect to Google Drive?
response: Open Integrations, click Connect Google Drive, sign in with your Google account, and select folders to sync.

instruction: What is the maximum number of collaborators?
response: Free plans allow up to 3 collaborators. Pro: 10, Business: 50, Enterprise: unlimited collaborators per workspace.

instruction: How do I rename a project?
response: Open the project, click the title at the top, type a new name, and press Enter to save.

instruction: How do I move a project to another workspace?
response: Open the project menu and select Move to Workspace, then choose the destination workspace from the list.

instruction: Can I restore a deleted project?
response: Yes, deleted projects stay in Trash for 30 days. Open Trash from the sidebar and click Restore on the project.

instruction: How do I add tags to a project?
response: In the project settings panel, click Add Tag, type a tag name, and press Enter. You can add up to 10 tags.

instruction: What keyboard shortcuts are available?
response: Press ? anywhere in the app to see all shortcuts. Common ones: Cmd+K to search, Cmd+N for new project.

instruction: How do I change the theme?
response: Open Settings, select Appearance, and choose Light, Dark, or System to match your operating system.

instruction: Does the product support dark mode?
response: Yes, dark mode is supported across the web app, desktop apps, and mobile apps.

instruction: Can I customize the dashboard?
response: Yes, you can add, remove, and rearrange widgets on your dashboard from the Edit Layout button.

instruction: How do I create a template?
response: Open any project, click Save as Template, give it a name and description, and choose who can use it.

instruction: Where do I find templates?
response: Click New Project and select From Template. Browse community templates or your saved templates.

instruction: How do I import data from Excel?
response: Click Import, select your Excel file, choose the sheet, and map columns to the project's fields.

instruction: Can I import data from Notion?
response: Yes, connect Notion under Integrations and use Import to copy databases into a new project.

instruction: How do I export to PDF?
response: Click Export in the top right, select PDF, choose page size and orientation, and click Download.

instruction: What is the maximum file upload size?
response: 50MB on Free, 500MB on Pro, 2GB on Business, and 5GB on Enterprise per individual file.

instruction: How do I search across all my projects?
response: Press Cmd+K (Ctrl+K on Windows) to open global search and type to find projects, files, and items.

instruction: Can I search inside file contents?
response: Yes, Pro and higher plans index document contents. The badge in search results shows where the match was found.

instruction: How do I set up notifications?
response: Go to Settings, then Notifications, and choose which events trigger email, push, or in-app alerts.

instruction: Can I mute notifications during off-hours?
response: Yes, set quiet hours under Settings, then Notifications, then Quiet Hours.

instruction: How do I assign a task to a teammate?
response: Open the task, click the Assignee field, and select a team member from the list.

instruction: Can I set deadlines on tasks?
response: Yes, click the Due Date field on a task and pick a date and optional time from the calendar.

instruction: How do I view tasks in a calendar?
response: Switch to Calendar view from the view selector at the top of any project with tasks.

instruction: Can I see all my tasks across projects?
response: Yes, open My Tasks from the sidebar to see every task assigned to you across all projects.

instruction: How do I create a recurring task?
response: Open the task, click Repeat, choose daily, weekly, monthly, or custom, and confirm the schedule.

instruction: How do I attach a file to a task?
response: Click the paperclip icon on the task, drag in a file, or paste a URL to link external content.

instruction: Can I comment on tasks?
response: Yes, scroll to the comments section at the bottom of any task. Type @ to mention a teammate.

instruction: How do I receive a daily summary?
response: Enable Daily Digest under Notifications, choose a delivery time, and select which projects to include.

instruction: How do I rotate my API key?
response: Open API Keys in Settings, click Rotate next to the key, and update your applications with the new key.

instruction: What languages does the AI assistant support?
response: The AI assistant works in English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, Japanese, and Chinese.

instruction: How do I clear my chat history?
response: Open the chat panel, click the menu icon, and select Clear History. This action cannot be undone.

instruction: Can I customize AI responses?
response: Yes, on Business and Enterprise plans you can set a custom system prompt under Settings, AI Configuration.

instruction: Is my data used to train your models?
response: No, customer data is never used to train AI models. You can verify this in our Privacy Policy.

instruction: How do I report incorrect AI output?
response: Click the thumbs-down icon next to any AI response and add an optional note. Reports help us improve quality.

instruction: What happens to my work when I go offline?
response: Changes are queued locally and synced automatically the next time you connect to the internet.

instruction: How do I find the version history of a file?
response: Open the file, click the clock icon in the top right, and browse previous versions or restore one.

instruction: Can I see who edited a file last?
response: Yes, the file header shows the last editor's name and timestamp. Hover for the full edit history.

instruction: How do I lock a project from edits?
response: Open project settings, scroll to Permissions, and toggle Lock Project. Only admins can unlock it.

instruction: Where can I leave product feedback?
response: Use the Feedback button in the bottom right of any page. We read every submission and reply to most within a week.
